name: form-deletion
label: Form Deletion
description: A gear to process delete requests for submitted form data
author: NACC

request_file.description: A JSON file with delete request information

form_configs_file.description: A JSON file with forms module configurations

apikey_path_prefix.description: The instance specific AWS parameter path prefix for apikey

database_mode.description: Whether to pull identifiers from dev or prod database

check_subsequent_visits.description: Check whether there are any subsequent QC passed visits (enabled by default, set false to bypass)

skip_accepted_project.description: Skip deleting files from the accepted project (disabled by default, set true to skip)
